scripts.dev: trap 'docker compose down' EXIT; concurrently -n docker,api,client,mock -c gray,blue,green,yellow "docker compose up" "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:client" "npm:dev:mock"
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev
scripts.install:all:
echo '
========== Installing: root ==========' && npm install && echo '
========== Installing: api-server ==========' && cd packages/api-server && npm install && echo '
========== Installing: client ==========' && cd ../client && npm install && echo '
========== Installing: mock-service ==========' && cd ../mock-service && npm install && echo '
========== Installing: iframe-app ==========' && cd ../iframe-app && npm install && echo '
========== Installing: keycloak ==========' && cd ../../keycloak && npm install && echo '
========== Setup complete =========='
scripts.build: cd packages/api-server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd packages/api-server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.type-check: cd packages/api-server && npm run type-check && cd ../client && npm run type-check && cd ../mock-service && npm run type-check
scripts.setup:
npm run install:all && echo '
========== Starting docker ==========' && docker compose up -d && echo '
========== Waiting for postgres ==========' && docker compose exec postgres pg_isready -U rita -d onboarding --timeout=60 && echo '
========== Running migrations ==========' && npm run migrate && echo '
========== Starting dev servers ==========' && npm run dev
